input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7430 [Automation] java run fails for ognl:ognl:3.3.5; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Some existing OGNL tests exercise deprecated SecurityManager behavior and JDK-internal accessibility paths; on JDK 25 those should be guarded or adapted in test code rather than handled through global setup.
The reported java-run failure is a changed assertion in ObjectPropertyAccessorTest, not evidence of missing setup.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: OGNL is a pure Java expression/object-graph navigation library; the resolved 3.3.5 artifact only needs its normal transitive Javassist dependency, and no external service, Docker image, extra Maven dependency, environment variable, or required system property is needed before meaningful tests can run.
